next_steps: Perform image-guided nasopharyngeal and skull base mucosal biopsy for histopathology, immunophenotyping, and microbiology
Perform urinalysis with microscopy for red cell casts to screen for glomerulonephritis
Perform lumbar puncture with cytology and flow cytometry for suspected leptomeningeal involvement
Perform whole-body PET/CT scan to assess systemic involvement and target optimal biopsy sites
Ophthalmologic consultation for potential ocular involvement
